zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr於1462年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，她的父親John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald15歲，母親Janet Crosbiei25歲。她於1478年1月21日與Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年6月4日在蘇格蘭度福利爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr于1462年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，她的父亲John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald15岁，母亲Janet Crosbiei25岁。她于1478年1月21日与Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1493年6月4日在苏格兰度福利爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: Mariëtte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr was born in 1462, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, was 15 and her mother, Janet Crosbiei, was 25. She married Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles on 21 January 1478, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 June 1493, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr est née en 1462, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Janet Crosbiei, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles le 21 janvier 1478, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1493, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr 1462 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 15 und ihre Mutter Janet Crosbiei 25. Sie hat am 21. Januar 1478 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1493 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr è nata il nel 1462 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Janet Crosbiei, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles il 21 gennaio 1478, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1493, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herrが1462年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldは15歳，母Janet Crosbieiは25歳であった。1478年1月21日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでHerbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terreglesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年6月4日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr(이)가 1462년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Crosbiei(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1478년 1월 21일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 6월 4일 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr nasceu em 1462, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Janet Crosbiei, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles em 21 de janeiro de 1478, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1493, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr родилась в 1462 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Crosbiei, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles 21 января 1478 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 июня 1493 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr nació en 1462, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Janet Crosbiei, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles el 21 de enero de 1478, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1493, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 31 años.
